faqs.question: Q: Which major specializations are available at Alva's Homoeopathic Medical College?

faqs.answer: Courses offered by Alva's Homoeopathic Medical College are BHMS. These courses are in the stream of Medicine & Health Sciences. Alva's Homoeopathic Medical College offers specializations such as BHMS specializations in Homeopathy.
faqs.question: Q: Which courses are available at Alva's Homoeopathic Medical College for students?

faqs.answer: Alva's Homoeopathic Medical College admission is entrance-based. The college accepts NEET for admission to its BHMS programme. No candidate will be considered for admission in Bachelor of Homoeopathic Medicine and Surgery (BHMS) course unless the candidate attains the age of 17 years on or before the 31st day of December of the year of admission in the first year of the Course.
faqs.question: Q: What is the admission criteria at Alva's Homoeopathic Medical College?

faqs.answer: At the undergraduate level, Alva's Homoeopathic Medical College offers BHMS programme. For admissions to this programme, candidates must have passed Class 12 or its equivalent examination from any recognised Board with Physics, Chemistry, Biology. In addition to this, students must have obtained a minimum of 50% aggregate taken together in Physics, Chemistry and Biology/ Biotechnology (40% aggregate for SC, ST and Other Backward Classes).

National Institute of Pharmaceutical Education and Research, Ahmedabad offers MPharm as popular programmes in full-time mode with an annual intake of 75 students. The Institute offers admission to the course on the basis of merit and entrance scores. MPharm is offered across multiple specialisations for a duration of 2 years.
Furthermore, candidates can pursue these course by securing a minimum aggregate of 50% in Graduation or equivalent, along with a non-zero score in NEET PG or NIPER JEE. For more details around NIPER Ahmedabad popular programmes, check out the table below:

admission_overview.college_name: NIPER Ahmedabad Admission 2026: Application process, Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

admission_overview.title: NIPER, Ahmedabad Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: National Institute of Pharmaceutical Education and Research, Ahmedabad admissions are both merit and entrance-based. The institution accepts NEET PG for MS programme and NIPER JEE for admission to a number of PG courses. NIPER JEE is the in house entrance examination conducted by NIPER group of institutins for admission. National Institute of Pharmaceutical Education and Research, Ahmedabad offers courses at PG and PhD levels. Presently, NIPER -A offers Masters programme in eight streams viz. Biotechnology, Natural Products, Pharmaceutics, Pharmaceutical Analysis, Medicinal Chemistry, Pharmacology & Toxicology, Medical Devices and Pharmaceutical Management and PhD programme in all streams except Pharmaceutical Management. Apply online on the official website of the institution for National Institute of Pharmaceutical Education and Research, Ahmedabad admissions 2026.

Candidates are required to participate in the admissions process through the application form. Candidates are required to appear for the entrance exams that are required for the course they wish to apply to. Candidates must clear the cutoff set by the institute to get the final admission offer.
faqs.question: What is the selection criteria for the NIPER, Ahmedabad courses?

faqs.answer: No, National Institute of Pharmaceutical Education and Research, Ahmedabad does not grant direct admission into any offered course. NIPER conducts its own entrance examination - NIPER JEE, for admission into certain courses like MBA etc.

faqs.question: How much is the semester fee for MPharma at NIPER Ahmedabad after the first semester?
faqs.answer: The subsequent semester fee for MPharma at NIPER Ahmedabad is around INR 53,328 per semester for General/OBC/EWS candidates and INR 27,306 per semester for SC/ST candidates, covering tuition, laboratory, library, hostel rent, electricity, and other institutional charges.

faqs.question: Is the fee different for sponsored candidates in the MPharma programme at NIPER Ahmedabad?
faqs.answer: Yes, Government/Industry-sponsored candidates pursuing MPharma at NIPER Ahmedabad have a higher fee structure, with about INR 1.68 lac payable at admission and INR 92,535 per semester thereafter, as per the official fee table.

faqs.question: Q: Which Medical fields offer the best work-life balance?

faqs.answer: Different reasons for flunking nursing classes are so numerous, yet unique to each and every person. Some of main causes that normally lead to one experiencing academic difficulties in nursing classes are:Difficulty understanding concepts: nursing programs are demanding, and it is genuinely tough to grasp very complicated medical concepts, procedures, and pharmacology.Clinical performance problems: These can be concerns for students who are experiencing complications with clinical skills or interpersonal communications.Poor study habits: One of most important study skills in any nursing program. A student who does not have proper study habits, time management, or organizational skills might not manage to keep pace according to coursework.Overwhelmed by workload: workload, in particular, can be intense in nursing programs, leaving students overwhelmed as to what to learn and acquire, complete as assignments, and spend in clinical hours.

highlights.summary: Watch out this space for the latest news around College of Veterinary Sciences and Animal Husbandry, Central Agricultural University, Mizoram Courses, Fees, Eligibility, Admission, Rankings and Reviews.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Veterinary Sciences and Animal Husbandry - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure, faculty members, events and placement

review_content.Placements: This a government-funded college for veterinary Science. According to new VCI syllabus, the course duration is five and a half year, and after completion of your course you will become a veterinary doctor, and you can apply for the jobs in both government as well as private sectors. Also, you can apply for the jobs in the Indian army and other graduate-level jobs. If you want to continue the study, you can do PG, or you can apply for MBA.
review_content.Infrastructure: This college has a good infrastructure. This college has 18 departments with well-facilitated labs, and it also has a library which is situated in the university (Orrisa University of Agriculture and Technology) to which this college belongs which is located within 200 meters away from the college. Here you can also take the advantage of free medical check-up in our health center, and it also has a race court of horses for NCC cadets. You can also take the chance of free horse riding skills ( only for NCC cadets). Different sports games are also arranged on annually, and you can also play different indoor and outdoor games in our sports complex like basketball, volleyball, cricket, carrom, badminton etc. The quality of labs and classrooms is good, and it is also providing smart classroom systems. Although there is no AC in the classrooms but there are sufficient fans. Each classroom consists of maximum 95 students.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Veterinary Sciences and Animal Husbandry - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Veterinary College review of Mizoram.

review_content.Placements: 90 percent of students were placed in job. The highest salary offered was 1 Lacs. We got job of Veterinary officer and many got the job of professor after finishing their MVSc. 100 percent of students got internship from our college. The highest stipend offered was Rs 24000 and the lowest stipend offered was Rs 12000. There is no placement cell though.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college is good and there are every facilities available. The labs have all equipment in adequate number and library has all sorts of books in adequate number. Medical facilities are good here and there is also provision for playing different types of games. Hostel rooms are descent and livable. I did not face any issue with infrastructure here.

review_summary.college_name: College of Veterinary Sciences and Animal Husbandry Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Veterinary Sciences and Animal Husbandry - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Review of College of Veterinary Sciences and Animal Husbandry, Aizawl, Mizoram.

content.Placements: There are many opportunities offered by our college. Every year many students go to Philippines for internship for 3 months. This opportunity is for those who are in top 10 of the class. All the financial facilities is carried by the government as this college is under Central Agricultural University.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of our college is so good because few years ago all the buildings were repainted. There are 2 beautiful hostels for boys and 2 girls hostel. Also 1 PG boys hostel and 1 PG girls hostel are present. One canteen is there for the students and one shop where everything is available. Labs are so well because our microBiology lab is ranked in the list as best for studying microBiology for vet.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Veterinary Sciences and Animal Husbandry - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure, faculty members, events and placement

content.Placements: This a government-funded college for veterinary Science. According to new VCI syllabus, the course duration is five and a half year, and after completion of your course you will become a veterinary doctor, and you can apply for the jobs in both government as well as private sectors. Also, you can apply for the jobs in the Indian army and other graduate-level jobs. If you want to continue the study, you can do PG, or you can apply for MBA.
content.Infrastructure: This college has a good infrastructure. This college has 18 departments with well-facilitated labs, and it also has a library which is situated in the university (Orrisa University of Agriculture and Technology) to which this college belongs which is located within 200 meters away from the college. Here you can also take the advantage of free medical check-up in our health center, and it also has a race court of horses for NCC cadets. You can also take the chance of free horse riding skills ( only for NCC cadets). Different sports games are also arranged on annually, and you can also play different indoor and outdoor games in our sports complex like basketball, volleyball, cricket, carrom, badminton etc. The quality of labs and classrooms is good, and it is also providing smart classroom systems. Although there is no AC in the classrooms but there are sufficient fans. Each classroom consists of maximum 95 students.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Veterinary Sciences and Animal Husbandry - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Veterinary College review of Mizoram.

content.Placements: 90 percent of students were placed in job. The highest salary offered was 1 Lacs. We got job of Veterinary officer and many got the job of professor after finishing their MVSc. 100 percent of students got internship from our college. The highest stipend offered was Rs 24000 and the lowest stipend offered was Rs 12000. There is no placement cell though.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college is good and there are every facilities available. The labs have all equipment in adequate number and library has all sorts of books in adequate number. Medical facilities are good here and there is also provision for playing different types of games. Hostel rooms are descent and livable. I did not face any issue with infrastructure here.

reviews_list.review_title: Review of Nargund College of Pharmacy.

review_content.Placements: Our college does not provide placements. It keeps us updated on vacancies. Most of the students who passed out this year are currently working in hospitals and research fields. Students got pharmacovigilance posts. The salary offered is Rs. 25,000 per month.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus is very small. We have well-maintained laboratories. Classrooms are spacious. There are separate hostels for boys and girls. They have wardens and securities. Hostels have strict timings. We have to follow them.

reviews_list.review_title: Review of Nargund College of Pharmacy.

review_content.Placements: In our college, students get placed in very good pharmaceutical and medicine production companies like Cipla, Supreem Pharmaceuticals, etc., and other medical supplies with a starting salary package of 3 LPA. Many students joined pharmaceutical stores like Apollo and MedPlus.
review_content.Infrastructure: Nargund College of Pharmacy is located near to main road and bus stop. CCTV cameras are provided in every classroom for safety. The library books are free to use. The food served in the canteen and mess is very tasty and hygienic at a low cost. The hostel has a separate building with needed facilities. Games are conducted as per the university schedule.

reviews_list.review_title: Very bad college, teaching is not that much good.

review_content.Placements: College is good for teaching but placements are very poor in our college. Last year only 2 companies came to offer job, but no one was selected.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available 24/7, also library is available for students. Classrooms are good, but not that much excellent. Cleaning is good in college, but there is no proper facilities for toilet. Also infrastructure is not that much good. Wi-Fi is only for final year students.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are highly qualified for us, teaching is average. Exam is of annual pattern, 3 sessional which are held in whole year and 1 final exam, and exams are very hard to clear, study is mandatory for passing. 50% marks are needed for passing in Pharma.D course, and after completing Pharma.D we will get Dr. Degree.

review_summary.college_name: Nargund College of Pharmacy Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.title: The principal and staff are good, but there is a need for further improvement in infrastructure.

content.Placements: 30-40% of students got placement, with an average package of 20-30,000 offered. Top recruiters include IQVIA, CELLCAL, Torrent Pharma, Cipla, Sun Pharma, Micro Lab, and Dr. Reddy. 90% of students got internships with companies like Micro Lab, Juggat Pharma, Overseas, KAPL, Cipla, and Srusti Pharmaceutical. Top roles include MR, clinical research associate, clinical research coordinator, drug safety associate, junior QA, junior QC, hospital pharmacist, community pharmacist, and clinical pharmacist.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is not available for students, only for staff. Labs are average, I think they can improve more so that they meet the standards and have more equipment and instruments. The classroom is also average, with a green board and projector. The college does have a playground where students can play games like volleyball, football, and other sports. The library has been reviewed properly to check which books are available for every semester and introduce new books for the students according to PCI approval.

individual_reviews.title: Review of Nargund College of Pharmacy.

content.Placements: Almost everyone from my batch is placed in different companies and hospitals. The highest package is around 3 lakhs per annum and the lowest is around 1.5 lakhs per annum. Everyone got internships in different pharmaceutical companies, industries, hospitals and labs.
content.Infrastructure: The main college building and the girls hostel are connected, and there is a separate boys hostel. The canteen is common for both and is situated separately. Labs are some of the best ones I've seen. Also, there is a nano-molecular lab in this college, which is not available in many colleges. There is a library. Wifi is available. There is no specific common room, but sports are encouraged.

individual_reviews.title: Review of Nargund College of Pharmacy.

content.Infrastructure: The campus is very small. We have well-maintained laboratories. Classrooms are spacious. There are separate hostels for boys and girls. They have wardens and securities. Hostels have strict timings. We have to follow them.

content.Infrastructure: Nargund College of Pharmacy is located near to main road and bus stop. CCTV cameras are provided in every classroom for safety. The library books are free to use. The food served in the canteen and mess is very tasty and hygienic at a low cost. The hostel has a separate building with needed facilities. Games are conducted as per the university schedule.

reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available 24/7, also library is available for students. Classrooms are good, but not that much excellent. Cleaning is good in college, but there is no proper facilities for toilet. Also infrastructure is not that much good. Wi-Fi is only for final year students.

reviews.review_heading: Students like to participate in different activities or sports they can avoid it.
reviews.review_text: As honest, the college is good in labs but not have good management. Hostel is cheap and good have daily cleaning facility as well. College is not providing Wi-Fi for hostel. Library is good and have all the pharma books. Classroom are good and have advance teaching facility. College don't have any campus facility. The mess is good. College don't have any playground. Overall average .

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is good.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are not good. The transportation facilities are not available. The library and labs are available. Hostel facilities are good, and we will get good food from time to time. Sports and games are not available.

reviews.review_heading: Labs don't have required equipment and chemicals, and the library has a less number of books.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available but passwords are regularly changed, labs and classrooms are average, there is no ground for sports or parking vehicles. The hostel is average but the food is the worst, and sports and games happen only once a year with improper surveillance and management.

reviews.review_heading: Our infrastructure is not good and it needs to be improved.
reviews.review_text: In this college, Wi-Fi was enabled. Laboratories, classrooms, and a library were available in this college. Our campus was not big. Sports were also not available. But a sports team was available and students play university games, students can also make their team and participate in other colleges that will be full support from the management side so students can find easily. Hostel facilities were good in this college. There was no campus, and sports were also not available.

reviews.review_heading: Average placement and nice infrastructure. Overall nice experience.
reviews.review_text: The facilities were somehow good. The college has Wi-Fi though it is not for students. The Labs were well-equipped and has a nice environment for conducting practical experiments Classrooms are at its best equipped with projector. And library are also bundled with books. But Hostel was in the average state as we encountered scarcity of water but overall it was average. Canteen food was not up to the mark but somehow manageable. Sports & games were conducted. Annual Sports Meet every year was a  ...

highlights.summary: ShriRam College of Pharmacy, ShriRam Group of Colleges is an institute. ShriRam College of Pharmacy, ShriRam Group of Colleges is approved by PCI and AICTE and offers a total of 4 courses at UG and PG levels in 2 specialisations such as Pharmaceutical and Pharmacology. Furthermore, it offer courses such as B.Pharma, M.Pharma and D.Pharma in Full Time mode. ShriRam College of Pharmacy, ShriRam Group of Colleges fee structure includes a total tuition fee ranging from INR 1,50,000 to 2,40,000. reviews_list.review_title: The college is good with a great staff.

review_content.Placements: 50% students got placed from this college. The highest package offered is 12 LPA and the lowest is 2.5 LPA. Byjus Education, Mankind, cipla, alkums Pharmaceutical Limited, etc. are the top recruiting companies. 90% students got internship. Pharmaceutical industries jobs, marketing, sales jobs, HR, Academic, QA and QC, Medical representative in pharma company, etc. are the top roles offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: A Library is available for students. Wi-Fi is also available at 5G speed. Labs are good with lab assistants. Canteen and medical facilities are also available in the college. Games and sports facilities are available for the students. Saturday is reserved as games and sports day.

reviews_list.review_title: Our college is a waste of money. I suggest not taking admission to this college.

review_content.Placements: The percentage of students was approximately 45%. The lowest salary package being offered by colleges was Rs. 12,000 per month and the highest salary package was Rs. 17,000 per month. There is no best company in our college for placements. They always invite local companies. The main thing is that they never provide an internship to a student.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has no good management for the hostel. Because there is a lack of mess, they don't even have a warden in the hostel. They don't provide any air-conditioners. They don't have any mess in the hostel.

reviews_list.review_title: Best College for Pharmacy.

review_content.Placements: This college has a 98 percent placement chance in India and a 67 percent placement chance in international countries. This college is the world's 7th best college because they provide quality education and content. If you want to succeed in your life, this college is for you.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus is very clean and beautiful, providing free Wi-Fi and free books, and also offering hygienic food. They care for your health and are a budget-friendly college. I recommend you take admission in this college; I think this is the best college in India.

reviews_list.review_title: The college campus is good with good teachers.

review_content.Placements: About 70% of students were placed in the pharmaceutical industry the previous year. The highest salary package offered is 12 LPA and the lowest is 3 LPA. Zydus, Cipla, Mankind, Alkums, Byjus, etc. About 90% of students got internships at OSR Trust. Top roles offered are digital marketing, quality assurance, and quality control.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus is well designed with high-speed internet. The library has enough books and journals. A canteen is also available inside the campus with a lot of hygienic foods. The campus has medical facilities with well-trained doctors and pharmacists. Games and sports are also available on campus.

reviews_list.review_title: Good future from Shi Ram Collage.

review_content.Placements: Currently, I am in my 3rd year in B.Pharma so I know a lot about my college which is at Bamore. This is a normal college for students, not that high but good for B. Pharma so I will recommend this. Now, the completion in the B. Pharma is not that high compared to B.Tech. We have a high chance of getting placed. Some of my seniors also got placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: The overall campus is big and great to enjoy. We have many places to spend free time. There are separate buildings for each course block so overall it's big and beautiful. My campus has a decent size. We have a hostel with mess. Library is also available to get books.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Bhagwant University offers several UG programmes in diverse streams such as Engineering, Management, Applied Sciences, Pharmacy, Arts, Commerce, etc. The university offers respective courses with various approvals and recognitions. Some of the UG level courses offered by Bhagwat University are BTech, BPharm, BCom, BA LLB, BBA, and others. At the postgraduate level, the University offers 10 courses, including MTech, MBA, MSc, MPT, MPharm, MEd, LLB, LLM, MA, MSW and B.Ed. In addition, it also offers diploma and certificate courses in several specialisations for a course duration of one year and six months, respectively. Apart from this, it offers a five-year PhD programme in six specialisations. Given below is an overview of Bhagwant University courses and duration:

faqs.answer: A:    Bhagwant Univeristy's Institute of Engineering & Technology offers 11 specialisations where intake is from 60-120 students per year. Four specialised branches, such as Nanotech, Biotech, Petroleum and Aeronautical has intake of 60 students whereas demanding and conventional branches such as ECE, CE, ME has intake capacity of 120 students.
faqs.question: How many seats are available for B.Tech at Bhagwant University?

faqs.question: What is the seat intake for the DPharma course at Bhagwant University?

Soon after the release of the CUET official notification, the CUET registration 2026 process commenced online at the official website. overview_faqs.question: Is Bhagwant University DPharma degree valid or not?
overview_faqs.answer: The DPharma degree from Bhagwant University is 100% valid. The university is recognised by the University Grants Commission (UGC). It is also an ISO-9001-certified and JEE-listed University. Bhagwant University is a member of the Association of Indian Universities (AIU), Federation of Indian Chambers of Commerce and Industry (FICCI), Indian Association of Physiotherapists (AIP), and All India Management Association (AIMA).Therefore, after completing DPharma degree from Bhagwant University, students can legally pursue a variety of careers in the public and private sectors. Students can go for further education in the fields of Pharmacys such as Bachelor's in Pharmacy (BPharma).

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee for BSc at Bhagwant University?
overview_faqs.answer: The overall fee for BSc at Bhagwant University ranges from INR 75,000- INR 4.5 lakh. The BSc fee varies throughout the specialisations candidates want to apply in. Applicants must pay the course fee at the final stage of the admission procedure confirming their admission. The BSc fees include multiple fee components such as caution deposit, incidental expenses, and alumni membership. This fee amount is as per the official website/sanctioning body. It is still subject to changes and hence, is indicative.

overview_faqs.question: Is Bhagwant University BPharma degree valid or not?
overview_faqs.answer: The BPharma degree from Bhagwant University is 100% valid. The university is recognised by the University Grants Commission (UGC). It is also an ISO-9001-certified and JEE-listed University. Bhagwant University is a member of the Association of Indian Universities (AIU), Federation of Indian Chambers of Commerce and Industry (FICCI), Indian Association of Physiotherapists (AIP), and All India Management Association (AIMA).Therefore, after completing BPharma degree from Bhagwant University, students can legally pursue a variety of careers in the public and private sectors. Students can go for further education in the fields of Pharmacys such as Bachelor's in Pharmacy (BPharma).

overview_faqs.question: What is the scope of BPharma course from Bhagwant University?
overview_faqs.answer: BPharmacy Graduates from Bhagwant University can find employment in public and private hospitals, clinics, medical supply stores, etc. Candidates can even open their consulting firm or medical business. It is one of the few degrees that allows candidates to pursue a variety of post-graduate opportunities. A BPharma degree can lead to a PG Diploma in Pharmacy, an MBA, an M Pharma, and, other degrees.

review_summary.college_name: Bhagwant University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.title: My college is overall very good.

content.Placements: More than 1000 students every year pass out. In my college, the highest package is 10 Lacs, and the lowest package is more than 2 Lacs. In my college, the highest-paid company is Tata, and there are more than 10 companies. My college offers more than 80 percent internships.
content.Infrastructure: In my college, the faculty is very awesome.My college Wi-Fi is very stable and has good internet. My college has a very clean and calm environment. My college library is good.
content.Faculty: My college teachers are very helpful and have very good knowledge in particular subjects. B pharmacy is relevant to my career. My college students are ready for industry. The semester exams are moderate, and is relevant to my subjects.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Say no to admission to Bhagwant University.

content.Placements: They only conduct the placement job fair for a whole year, and companies come into that fair to give us job opportunities, so students gain the opportunity as it is, without getting an approach from outside the campus. It is a 1-day process, and the results will get to you soon after 2 working days.
content.Infrastructure: BU has two big premises, one for engineering and the other for BCA students named AIT. Both are separated by some distance, and they conduct semester-wise exams and get the results according to the attendance of the students. All teachers are crowded on the college premises.

individual_reviews.title: It is a good college with average faculty members and infrastructure.

content.Placements: As a fresher, I'm unaware of recruiting companies. Internships are provided to students at NGOs or district courts.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are good. Wi-Fi is available in the library. The quality of food served in the hostel is good. Law faculty members organise every kind of sport. Canteen should be maintained hygienically and the food is average.
content.Faculty: Teachers in our college are helpful and kind. They teach students from scratch of the course. The course curriculum teaches the basics of the course and is enough for the field. Semester exams are averagely difficult, so students need some practice. The pass percentage is 33%.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: My college makes great engineers like me.

content.Placements: There are 60 % students placed every year. The highest package is 8 LPA and the lowest is 4.8 LPA. Maruti suzuki is the top recruiter. Many students got internship from our department.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available for Electrical and electronics department are the best. The library is also perfect. The faculty of my college are fully educated and humble in nature.
content.Faculty: The inspection of exams is very strict and no one can cheat in the exams. Discipline is maintained. The semester exams are conducted from time to time. Our faculty helps students in the exams.

individual_reviews.title: Our university has good faculty members, good infrastructure, and facilities.

content.Infrastructure: The hostel is quite good. Overall, our university provides all the facilities.
content.Faculty: Faculty members are quite good. They are helpful, well-qualified, and extremely knowledgeable. Our course curriculum is also good. There is no difficulty in exams. The quality of teaching is very good.

admission_overview.college_name: Bhagwant University Admission 2025 (Open): Courses, Eligibility, Fee & Selection

paragraphs: Bhagwant Unversity admiission process 2025is both merit and entrance-based. Bhagwant University has 12 distinct faculties, including Agriculture, Engineering & Technology, Pharmacy, Education, Law, Management, etc. These faculty collectively offer more than 49 courses at undergraduate (UG), postgraduate (PG), Diploma, Certificate, and doctoral ( PhD) levels. The main focus area ofBhagwant Universityis various streams in Aeronautical, Petroleum, and Mining Engineering, Agriculture Science, Education, programmess. The courses offered by Bhagwant University are approved by BCI, NCTE, PCI, and AICTE.

Bhagwant University offers various programs in full-time mode. The programs are undergraduate, postgraduate, doctoral, and Diploma levels. Bhagwant University's selection process for various courses is both merit-based and entrance examination-based. Find the Bhagwant University admission details below:

Before applying to Bhagwant University, aspirants must ensure that they are meeting the eligibility requirements set by the university. For undergraduate admission, students must have passed Class 12 with a valid percentage. The selection criteria for various undergraduate programmes are merit-based. Bhagwant University fees include multiple components admission fees, tuition fees, hostel fees, exam fees, lab fees, and other charges.

Coming to affordability, it is one of the reasons why many students leave a degree or a college. While the availability of student loans and financial aid has made education accessible but the requirements to become eligible for a loan or a scholarship often stand as a challenge. Below areBhagwant University tuition feesalong with average package details for popular courses:

The reservation policy for students belonging to Economically Weaker Sections (EWS) categories is 10%. Students belonging to categories such as Schedule caste and Schedule Tribe range between 12% to 16%. The reservation policy will be applicable as per the Government of India. Find below the reservation details about Bhagwant University seat reservations:
*Reservation (%)

If candidates are able to fulfill the eligibility mentioned above criteria, they can apply online for admission to the Bhagwant University course. The admission process at Bhagwant University Rajasthan includes various stages such as application, selection round, document verification, and more. Follow the below admission procedure of the university:
Step 1: Bhagwant University Application
Interested aspirants can apply only online on the official website (bhagwantuniversity.ac.in/admission_rules) along with an application fee of INR 600 for the undergraduate and postgraduate courses.
Step 2: Selection round

Aspirants will be shortlisted based on their performance in the last qualifying examination for DPharma, BSc, B.Ed, etc. At the same time, admission for BTech, BPharma, and MBA requires a valid score in the entrance examination.
Step 3: Final Admission
Candidates need to submit the required documents along with the admission fee to secure a seat at Bhagwant University.

courses_data.description: Bhagwant University provides a full Time BE/BTech programme that takes four years to complete. To be admitted to this programme, students must have good scores in the JEE Main exam. Here is more information about the eligibility requirements, selection criteria, and fees for Bhagwant University BE/BTech admission. Bhagwant University offers several UG programmes in diverse streams such as Engineering, Management, Applied Sciences, Pharmacy, Arts, Commerce, etc. Admission to the majority of UG programmes is either based on UJET score or candidate's score in previous qualifying exam. The University follows a semester pattern for all its courses. However, the duration of all these programmes differ from course-to-course. An overview of all Bhagwant University UG programmes is listed in the tables below: Bhagwant University BTech admission is based on a candidate's score in UJET/ ENAT/JEE Main. The course duration for the programme is four years, comprising eight semesters. The University offers ten specialisations under its BTech programme with a collective seat intake of 630 students annually.

faqs.question: How many seats are available for B.Tech at Bhagwant University?
faqs.answer: Bhagwant Univeristy's Institute of Engineering & Technology offers 11 specialisations where intake is from60-120 students per year. Four specialised branches, such as Nanotech, Biotech, Petroleum and Aeronautical has intake of 60 students whereas demanding and conventional branches such as ECE, CE, ME has intake capacity of 120 students.

faqs.question: How can students check the Bhagwant University cutoff?
faqs.answer: The Bhagwant University declares its cut off marks every year after releasing results.The cut off marks is definitely important but mostly the result of class XII and graduation are taken into consideration.

faqs.question: Does Bhagwant University offer MBA programme?
faqs.answer: Yes, Bhagwant University offers an MBA/PGDM programme for graduates in both full-time and part-time mode. The full-time programme is of two-year duration while the part-time MBA is a three-year programme. MBA at Bhagwant University is also available in an integrated programme namely Integrated B.Tech. + MBA andIntegrated BBA + MBA.

courses_data.name: Bhagwant University PhD Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Bhagwant University offers a five -year PhD and one-and-a-half-year MPhil programme in various streams. Eligible applicants should score more than 40 percent in the entrance test to pass. Shortlisted candidates are further called for a research-based presentation round in which they should score more than 35 percent to qualify for admission. However, the University also exempts the candidates from university-level entrance test for those withCSIR NET/UGC NET/GATE/ SLET score. Such applicants are directly eligible for the presentation round. Find below the MPhil & PhD specialisations & their eligibility criteria: PhD Programmes Agriculture Science Pharmacy Management Computer Application Humanities and Applied Sciences Engineering & Technology

faqs.question: How can I get admission in Bhagwant University?
faqs.answer: Bhagwant University (BUA Ajmer) admission is both merit and entrance-based. Before applying to the BUA, candidates must ensure that they are meeting the eligibility set by the university. For UG admission, candidates must have passed Class 12 from a recognised board in the relevant specialisation. Programmes such as BPharma, BTech, MBA and PhD requires to appear for the entrance exam.Eligible candidatrs can apply online on the official website of the university. At the time of final admission confirmation, Candidates need to submit the required documents along with the admission fee to secure a seat at Bhawant University.

faqs.question: Does Bhagwant University accept CUET score for admissions?
faqs.answer: As per the official website, Bhagwant University acceptsJEE main/GATE/MAT/CAT exam for admission.  The university may accepts the CUET UG for few courses admission. The CUET UG registration process 2025 for admission to UG courses will commence tentatively during the last week of Feb 2025.

faqs.question: Is CUET exam registration open?
faqs.answer: Yes, Common University Entrance Test (CUET) 2026 registration commenced at cuet.nta.nic.in. NTA released the CUET 2026 notification on January 03 and reopened the window on February 23. Soon after the release of the CUET official notification, theCUET registration 2026process commenced online at the official website. Candidates willing to appear for the CUET 2026 exam must have completed complete the application form online. Additionally, before filling application form, candidates must make sure that they have fulfilled the prescribedCUET eligibility criteriato qualify for the entrance exam.

faqs.question: What is the application fee for D.Pharma at Bhagwant University?
faqs.answer: The application fee for DPharma at Bhagwant University is around INR 150 for its Indian students. Candidates must pay the application fee through the SBI payment gateway using debit card/ credit card/ net banking. Once the fee is paid applicants can conclude the application process by downloading the filled application.

faqs.question: What is the fee for DPharma at Bhagwant University?
faqs.answer: The overall fee for DPharma at Bhagwant University is around INR 2 lakh . The DPharma fee varies throughout the specialisations candidates want to apply in. Applicants must pay the course fee at the final stage of the admission procedure confirming their admission. The DPharma fees include multiple fee components such as caution deposit, incidental expenses, and alumni membership. This fee amount is as per the official website/sanctioning body. It is still subject to changes and hence, is indicative.

It is still subject to changes and hence, is indicative.

highlights.description: Bhagwant University is one of the India’s top ranked institutes. It is considered as a leading institute by national ranking bodies. As per India Today 2025, the institute has been ranked #73 under the University (Private) category. The institute is well known for its excellent academic offerings and top faculty. Candidates can go through the following to know more details around Bhagwant University rankings.

gallery_page.college_name: Bhagwant University Photos & Videos

hostel.description:
University has fully furnished separate hostel facilities for boys and girls. These are supported by an excellent mess, common room, STD-PCO, internet access, canteen, provision store, medical assistance, and to and fro transport facility to Railway Station/Bus Station during official breaks. Both the hostels are Air Cooled and have double/triple seated rooms. The unique feature of girl’s hostel is the availability of pantry with microwave, refrigerator and dry kitchen facility.
Specially designed AC hostel is also available for the foreign student which fulfills the requirement of continental food and comfortable stay.

library.description:
Bhagwant University's library has a collection of 95,000 printed books (with more than 3675 titles) which includes textbooks and reference books in the field of Engineering and Technology, Agriculture, Law, Sciences and Humanities, English Literature and Fiction. It subscribes to 69 magazines and has DELNET subscription.
The library provides regular membership to all the students, faculty members and employees of the Institute and also provides various services such as book bank facility, e-learning through NPTEL, virtual labs, e-newspapers, etc.

reviews.review_heading: My college is overall very good.
reviews.review_text: In my college, the faculty is very awesome.My college Wi-Fi is very stable and has good internet. My college has a very clean and calm environment. My college library is good.

reviews.review_heading: Say no to admission to Bhagwant University.
reviews.review_text: BU has two big premises, one for engineering and the other for BCA students named AIT. Both are separated by some distance, and they conduct semester-wise exams and get the results according to the attendance of the students. All teachers are crowded on the college premises.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with average faculty members and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are good. Wi-Fi is available in the library. The quality of food served in the hostel is good. Law faculty members organise every kind of sport. Canteen should be maintained hygienically and the food is average.

reviews.review_heading: My college makes great engineers like me.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for Electrical and electronics department are the best. The library is also perfect. The faculty of my college are fully educated and humble in nature.

reviews.review_heading: Our university has good faculty members, good infrastructure, and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is quite good. Overall, our university provides all the facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Its infrastructure is good, in 2019 I got a placement.
reviews.review_text: We have Wi-Fi and a library. The hostel room was spacious, quality of food is average. The ground was there, with bar hanging, and calisthenics sets. Hospital is near our college. ATMs were near our college. Good greenery view of campus. Good maintenance of the garden. Good north Indian food.

reviews.review_heading: This is the worst college.
reviews.review_text: There are only two faculty in our course. There is a gas chamber. Wi-Fi is available. The classrooms are average. The library is good, but the library incharge is bad. We got water, food, beds, and fans, but there is a lot of ragging in the hostel. The food is average in the mess and canteen. Sports and games are good.

reviews.review_heading: There is the best environment and facilities.
reviews.review_text: There were Wi-Fi and labs facilities. Moreover, there was a field for practicals. Facilities in the hostel are extremely good, but the problem is we need to adjust to the food. There were enough medical facilities for us and a canteen and a ground for games and sports. There was a special week for only sports and games in a month.

reviews.review_heading: My experience in 2017-21.
reviews.review_text:
Infrastructure is good in agricultural engineering.
But faculty is not enough in numbers.
Hostel is also good but there is also issue of food in hostel.
Labs are also not that good. 
So if you want to study here you have to learn from any other place like training place.

reviews.review_heading: I am disappointed because there are no qualified teachers.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available only for staff but in hostel, students can use Wi-Fi. But very slow speed. Library is available for all students. But 100 INR are charged to get library pass. Canteen is good. Medical facility was average. No sport equipment is provided by the college.

reviews.review_heading: I love our Bhagwant University.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a high infrastructure, many blocks, many classrooms and labs. There are a huge gallery and a huge lush green area. Our hostels are huge, and the warden is very good because he helps. Overall, I love my college life, and I missed it very much.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. The campus is huge, including all facilities. The college provides all laboratories like a chemistry lab, physics lab and bio lab with all necessary equipment. Sports facilities are also available, and also many sports competitions are organised by the college. Food served in the canteen is good. The canteen is clean, good and spacious.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Bhagwant University Ajmer (BUA).
reviews.review_text: University provides all sorts of resources for an ideal student who wants to gain knowledge and skills. Library, labs, canteen, gym hall, sports facilities, etc., are available on the campus. The building has a lift for disabled students. Gym hall has all the equipment, which is needed to maintain fitness. Sports teacher is available if you are interested in any games. For academic excellence, teachers are available for 24x7 coaching.

reviews.review_heading: I'm fully satisfied with our university and also with our faculty for a better future.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our university is quite good enough, and it looks beautiful. I also love my college. Infrastructure is also very much important for the new students who come to take admission. If the infrastructure is not good, then students can reject and may not take the admission.

reviews.review_heading: All of than it is a wonderful college.
reviews.review_text: The college faculty members are good. All of them are well-experienced. All the instruments are available in labs, and many good instruments, CNC machine also are available in this college for students. Many students take a class in the lab as it's useful in upcoming manufacturing.

review_summary.college_name: Jnan Chandra Ghosh Polytechnic College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied & happy with this faculty, good placement record, Science 2012, good environment.

content.Placements: Almost every student is placed in a company but a few students do not accept this and are going on to higher studies. Top companies are Siemens L&T Tata Voltas and Havells. The highest package is almost Rs. 30,000 per month (Mechanical) and the minimum is Rs. 19,000 per month.
content.Infrastructure: The laboratories are among the best compared to other government colleges offering well maintained equipment and a strong practical learning environment. Classrooms are clean well ventilated and conducive to focused study. Wi Fi facilities are available on campus; however access is currently restricted to staff members. The canteen provides decent food at affordable prices catering to the daily needs of students. Hostel facilities are available exclusively for girls ensuring safety and a comfortable living environment. Overall the campus maintains a clean and disciplined atmosphere focused on academic development rather than extravagance.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college with good placements.

content.Placements: Moderate placement record with a mix of both positive and negative experiences reported by students. Some students have reported successful placements in reputable companies like L&T, Capgemini, and John Deere, with average salaries of around Rs. 10,000 to Rs. 15,000 per month. However, other reviews indicate that placements can be inconsistent, with some students facing difficulties in securing jobs and lower salary packages.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good. Classrooms are good & big and clean. The library is pretty good. Generally positive infrastructure review, with features like well-equipped labs, classrooms, and a library. While the college offers a girls' hostel, some reviews suggest a need for a boys' hostel to accommodate students from outside the city. Overall, the college is considered to have good facilities and a healthy learning environment.

individual_reviews.title: Our college is good in all aspects. It provides top-notch placements.

reviews.review_heading: The college is awesome and I suggest everyone to take admission in this College.
reviews.review_text: There are lots of facilities in the hostel. But there is no boys hostel only girls hostel available and I suggest everyone to take admission in this College and Take advantage of the hostel. All the services of hostel are excellent and students feel that they are at home not at hostel. I think we need a boy’s hostel in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Our college had very good placements in 2022 and the college is superb.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. The college has a girls' hostel and the accommodation is very good. Several messes are available besides the college for boys from different cities.

reviews.review_heading: Lab facilities are not good here.
reviews.review_text: Labs are there but the materials are not proper. Maximum instruments and machines do not work. A hostel facility is there which is fine and with average quality food. Other things are good. Sports and games are not there in the college. Classrooms are average.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is a good choice.
reviews.review_text: Free Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, and cold water machines are available. Library provides free books every semester. Bike parking area is available for students and college staff. Beautiful campus, a large canteen which provides good quality food, and food court are available. It is an anti-ragging campus.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with previous year placement.
reviews.review_text: There are 11 rooms for theory classes and almost 15 laboratories. For our course, there are 3 individual rooms and the workshops like Smithy shop, Moulding Shop, Carpentry Shop, Welding Shop, Machine Shop, Fittings Shop, etc. Other facilities like Wi-Fi and the library are very well decorated. The quality of the food available in our canteen and mess is very good.

reviews.review_heading: It is A grade college with good and experienced faculty and also provides good placements.
reviews.review_text: The college itself is well-equipped with all the machines, labs, and other workshops. Students will be keen to know about the machines. The college has Wi-Fi for the betterment of students. The canteen is also available in the college at affordable prices so that every student can afford to buy the food.

reviews.review_heading: It has good circumstances, quality education and good facilities.
reviews.review_text: Every year our college should conduct sports annually. The food served in the canteen is good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for students who have a small budget.
reviews.review_text: We have facilities like labs, classrooms, practicals, Wi-Fi, and a library. There is no hostel facility available for boys but girls do have the hostel facility. Food quality is good enough. The college has its canteen. There are medical facilities available and annual sports are held.

reviews.review_heading: It's good from angle of knowledge. Infrastructure is old.
reviews.review_text: Lab, classroom, girls hostel, library, canteen is available here. All the things here are good but here need a boys hostel. Because many students came here from out of city. Government should build boys hostel. And here canteen is very expensive.

review_content.Placements: In my college, about 70% students got placement in good companies. The highest package till now is 10 LPA, and the lowest package is about 5 LPA. This depends on the students skills. Many top companies visit the college for placement, such as Sun Pharma, NIPER, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are many labs for each of the subjects, and classes are also available for the students. The classes have a fan board, etc, that is required. reviews_list.review_title: Really it is an awesome college with very helpful faculty members. Placements are very good.

review_content.Placements: From the previous batch, out of 36 students, about 30 students got placements. The average salary offered was Rs. 15,000 per month. The company which offered placements is Apollo Hospital. The role offered in our course is a pharmacist. The salary package varies as per the company, but the average salary package is 1.9 LPA. Above 90% of the students got internships from our course in Apollo Hospital.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has mainly three buildings, and one building is the college, while the other one is Indore stadium and boys common room. Last building is a girls' hostel. For practical and theory classes, there is room for students. Free Wi-Fi facility is available for all the students and faculty members. The library and computer lab are also available here. The hostel facility is so good, and the quality of the food served is also good.

highlights.summary: The CUET UG 2026 registration portal is now closed for Future Institute of Pharmacy admission to several UG courses. The CUET exam 2026 will be conducted from May 11 to May 31, 2026.

reviews_list.review_title: Acknowledgment with fun

review_content.Placements: Around 70-80% of students get placed in my course. The highest salary package offered in my college is around 8 LPA - 10 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is around 4 LPA - 5 LPA. Wipro and Cogent are recruiting companies for my course. Around 60% of students got internships in Wipro.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities which we get in our college are well-furnished and air-conditioned rooms, projectors for a better understanding of classes, etc. Hostels are fully furnished and consist of a dormitory and gym.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are very helpful. We are very grateful to get that many helpful teachers. All teachers are well-qualified. All are post-graduated and well-knowledgeable. This course is relevant. It makes students industry-ready for a better tomorrow.

reviews_list.review_title: My college is very good. And they give good placements.

review_content.Placements: Companies from outside come to our college and select students from the college and take them away. Company name: Apollo, Mahindra etc. 90% of the students get placements in our college. And they get placements in good places and get good packages.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel of our college is very good. Many facilities are provided in our college hostel, such as free Wi-Fi facility, free gym facility, and all types of rooms are provided for living. In our college hostel, we get food and breakfast on time. Good.

review_summary.college_name: Future Institute of Pharmacy Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.title: Future University gives you the best placement and quality education with the power of AI.

content.Placements: I am in my second year of my Bachelor of Pharmacy course, so I didn't have knowledge about that, but my seniors have very good jobs. Overall, the experience in college was good, and teachers are motivated for placement and well-paying jobs.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of my Future University is very lovely and beautiful. The labs are very advanced, and now Future University is the first AI-enabled university, so a lecture on AI and technology is added to every course. I didn't issue a hostel, so I have no information for that.

individual_reviews.title: I am from the 2020-2024 batch.

content.Placements: Some of us got placements through a job fair held at our college. Only 10% of students got placed that too in a job fair held by our college. No one got any internship recommendations as well. We have done internships on our own. There are no placements.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very nice. Hostel rooms are quite good and big. Classrooms are fully air-conditioned. The Wi-Fi password is not shared to us. Labs are very spacious but most of the time chemicals are short so we are not able to perform the experiments properly. Grounds are very big . In fact, the golf ground is also there. The canteen is well-maintained and one Cafe is also there. The library is good, and it has some rare books that cannot be found in the market.

individual_reviews.title: Acknowledgment with fun

content.Placements: Around 70-80% of students get placed in my course. The highest salary package offered in my college is around 8 LPA - 10 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is around 4 LPA - 5 LPA. Wipro and Cogent are recruiting companies for my course. Around 60% of students got internships in Wipro.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities which we get in our college are well-furnished and air-conditioned rooms, projectors for a better understanding of classes, etc. Hostels are fully furnished and consist of a dormitory and gym.
content.Faculty: Teachers are very helpful. We are very grateful to get that many helpful teachers. All teachers are well-qualified. All are post-graduated and well-knowledgeable. This course is relevant. It makes students industry-ready for a better tomorrow.

individual_reviews.title: My college is very good. And they give good placements.

content.Placements: Companies from outside come to our college and select students from the college and take them away. Company name: Apollo, Mahindra etc. 90% of the students get placements in our college. And they get placements in good places and get good packages.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel of our college is very good. Many facilities are provided in our college hostel, such as free Wi-Fi facility, free gym facility, and all types of rooms are provided for living. In our college hostel, we get food and breakfast on time. Good.

individual_reviews.title: I am dissatisfied with the course as there is no placement in this course at all.

content.Placements: They are providing placements in Marketing in companies like Zone. It provides field sales jobs in the FMCG section, not even in the medical section. In 2024, only one company, Zone, came, and they also selected 6 students, but it is a sales job, and they are giving the location in Delhi, so no one has joined it. Placement for the Bachelor of Pharmacy course in the future college is the worst, and you can even say there is no placement.
content.Infrastructure: It has good infrastructure in terms of buildings, and all classrooms have AC, but no Wi-Fi on campus. I don't know about the hostel as I am a local student, so I don't live there, but my friends are from there, and they tell me the hostel is okay, but the food is not good.

reviews_list.review_title: In this college, everything is fine but things can get better.

review_content.Placements: There were 50 doctors who yearly graduate from this college, they study for 4 years then internships for 1 year i.e the study period was nearly 5 and a half years. They pass out in 5 and half years, and then apply for UPSC exams and after qualifying they get jobs.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was not great, students need a lot of changes. The hostel facilities were not good, everything needs the students to run after teachers and a single hostel was provided. The new hostel was not being constructed, students want a new hostel as there were many students taking admission. The infrastructure of this college was not good.

reviews_list.batch_info: BHMS - Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: No campus placement, no homoeopathic medical college in Odisha, located in the city centre.

review_content.Placements: No facility for campus placement, but you can find a suitable job at a private hospital and Homoeopathic pharma companies easily. Maximum students after passout go through that way, with a maximum salary of Rs. 5,00,000 annually, minimum of Rs. 3,60,000 annually at the fresher level.
review_content.Infrastructure: Every classroom has working AC, fans, and smart boards or projectors, which makes learning comfortable. However, there is no Wi-Fi available for students, which can be a drawback for online study or research. Labs for Anatomy, Physiology, Pharmacy, and other subjects are well-equipped, but some instruments could be updated. Library has a good number of books and is a quiet place to study, though more recent editions would be helpful.

highlights.summary: Watch out this space for the latest news around Yashoda Institute of Physiotherapy Courses, Fees, Eligibility, Admission, Rankings and Reviews.

faqs.answer: A:    Yashoda Institute of Physiotherapy has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityBPTCandidate must have passed 10+2 with Physics, Chemistry, and Biology as their main subjects and obtained minimum mentioned marks from a recognised board.
faqs.question: How can I get into Yashoda Institute of Physiotherapy for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?

review_content.Placements: Students above 93% are placed from this course. 15000-20000 INR per month is the lowest salary and 30000 INR is the highest. Top recruiting hospitals visit here. Maximum students from my college got internship in top hospitals such as KIMS, YASHODA, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Labs, classrooms and library are hygienic and good. Hostel facilities are good enough. Hostel's mess is also good. Canteen is fine. Medical facilities are good because weekly twice a doctor is available of Yashoda hospital. We can play sports and games twice in a week.

reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with the college environment and teaching skills of faculty.

review_content.Placements: No placement are provided from the college side. But by the completion of the 3rd year students has to do practical clinic sessions so he or she will gain experience and will get access to keep a physiotherapy clinic or as physiotherapist. And this passed out physiotherapist can join in any sports and games club for players treatment.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities at the yashoda college of physiotherapy are good. Compare to the lectures practical sessions are also done equal to classes. No Wi-Fi access is available at the college because not much computers used. Also food quality at the canteen is so good and satisfied by charges are high. We had good medical facilities because we are from medical college.

reviews_list.review_title: Review of Yashoda Institute of Physiotherapy.

review_content.Placements: Our college has no placements, but there are multiple possibilities in multispecialty hospitals once we have completed our bachelor's degree. You can work as a physiotherapist in multispecialty hospitals. Students of this course can also visit home and earn independently.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has a therapy lab, a gait lab, an electrotherapy lab, an anatomy lab, a physiology lab, etc. Our college provides excellent infrastructure. A canteen is available. It is a good college.
review_content.Faculty: Our teachers are excellent. They have five years of clinical experience. Exams are conducted yearly. Exams are challenging. The pass percentage is 50%. The course makes students industry-ready. The syllabus was completed on time, so we scored around 90%.

reviews_list.review_title: I am dissatisfied because of management and their way of working .

review_content.Placements: Nearly about 10% of the students get placements. Only 1-2 companies visit for interviews or may not visit sometime. Overall I am dissatisfied with the college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The room and facilities are good. A room is allowed to 2 students. Medical facilities are not provided. Sports on campus are officially not organised frequently. Wi-Fi is available but is not working properly and there are network issues always. Availability of books is very disappointed for all time. But food quality is average.
review_content.Faculty: Staff is good and helpful up to their level but the management is not helping students properly after admission. It is fine for every small problem. No campus tours and visits are held. Major problem of all the is to maintain 75% of attandence in all subjects.

reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with everything which our college provides us.

review_content.Placements: Almost 52% of the students got placed in our semester. The salary offered is Rs. 15,000 to 50,000 per month. Nestle, Pulsus and Abryl are the companies for placements. Almost 100% of the students got an internship in top reputed companies. Top roles offered to the students are in industrial, quality assurance, medical journal and many others.
review_content.Infrastructure: Everything is up to date and good. It is a good university, and it is providing infinite opportunities to its students. It is the best for education and mainly for practical propose. I am highly satisfied to be a part of this university. It was an amazing experience, and it was worth spending four years of my life on this campus.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee for UG courses at Maharishi Markandeshwar University Sadopur?
overview_faqs.answer: Undergraduate tuition fees (in INR) at Maharishi Markandeshwar University Sadopur vary depending on the program. MBBS costs 8.5 lakhs, BBA costs 85,000, and B.Tech costs 1.42 lakhs. MMU Mullana's hostel fees range from 70,000 to 80,000 per year. Keep in mind that hostel costs may vary depending on the course chosen.

overview_faqs.question: Is pursuing BCA at Maharishi Markandeshwar University Sadopur expensive?
overview_faqs.answer: Maharishi Markandeshwar University also known as MMU provides variety of courses and with a great curriculum. The total tution fees for BCA at Maharishi Markandeshwar University Sadopur is INR 2.66 LPA, so it is not expensive. They provide some opportunities so that students get placed. The study environment is good, and teachers always try to give more and more information as much as possible. It is a good college to gain knowledge.

overview_faqs.question: Is Maharishi Markandeshwar University Sadopur a good college for BBA?
overview_faqs.answer: Fees for BBA at Maharishi Markandeshwar University, Sadopur is 85,000 INR (Yearly). Maharishi Markandeshwar University, Sadopur BBA admission is offered on the basis of the merit of the qualifying exam. Two courses are offered by Maharishi Markandeshwar University, Sadopur1. BBA in Financial Services2. BBA in Brand Management & CommunicationPlacement in both the courses is good. Overall Maharishi Markandeshwar University Sadopur is a good college for BBA

review_summary.college_name: Maharishi Markandeshwar University Sadopur Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.title: MM Institute of Nursing and Research.

content.Placements: The college provides a better education than most M.Ed. colleges. After the course, they provide internships in their own hospital for the students' good experience, so that they can get high-paying jobs in the future. The hospital infrastructure is also good.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel infrastructure is also good. They provide a room for two students with two almirahs and an attached bathroom. The Wi-Fi service is also best, and the food here in the mess is also good, but they can do better in that. The canteen area is also good with beautiful decorations.

individual_reviews.title: Good cost to study facility.

content.Placements: About 90% of students are placed in Bachelor of architecture courses. The highest package was 3.5 LPA and the lowest package is 2 LPA. The average package is 2.75 LPA. Larsen and turbo, Tata construction, Sikka associates, etc. About100% of students got internships in our course. The top roles offered are architecture assistant and associate architect.
content.Infrastructure: Good infrastructure and very good lecture halls and theaters, the quality of food are above average in mess and canteen, overall infrastructure and labs are very good to go, Wi-Fi is of good quality little bit glitch sometimes but that is nearly negligible, the library is very good quite equipped with quite a room.

individual_reviews.title: I am dissatisfied because of management and their way of working .

content.Placements: Nearly about 10% of the students get placements. Only 1-2 companies visit for interviews or may not visit sometime. Overall I am dissatisfied with the college.
content.Infrastructure: The room and facilities are good. A room is allowed to 2 students. Medical facilities are not provided. Sports on campus are officially not organised frequently. Wi-Fi is available but is not working properly and there are network issues always. Availability of books is very disappointed for all time. But food quality is average.
content.Faculty: Staff is good and helpful up to their level but the management is not helping students properly after admission. It is fine for every small problem. No campus tours and visits are held. Major problem of all the is to maintain 75% of attandence in all subjects.

individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with everything which our college provides us.

content.Placements: Almost 52% of the students got placed in our semester. The salary offered is Rs. 15,000 to 50,000 per month. Nestle, Pulsus and Abryl are the companies for placements. Almost 100% of the students got an internship in top reputed companies. Top roles offered to the students are in industrial, quality assurance, medical journal and many others.
content.Infrastructure: Everything is up to date and good. It is a good university, and it is providing infinite opportunities to its students. It is the best for education and mainly for practical propose. I am highly satisfied to be a part of this university. It was an amazing experience, and it was worth spending four years of my life on this campus.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Overall it is a good college and they also provide quality of education.

content.Placements: Our seniors got placed in cloud analogy at around 3 LPA. But overall placements are not good. But they also provide some opportunities so that student get placed. But their study environment is good, and teachers always try to give more and more information as much as possible. It is a good college to gain knowledge.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good, and we also have the right to use college resource like Wi-Fi, and classrooms are good. The library is well defined. The infrastructure of the college is good. In the hostel, rooms are good, and they provide air-conditioned and non-air-conditioned room as well. The quality of the food served is good, and they also conduct some sports activities.

admission_overview.college_name: Maharishi Markandeshwar University Sadopur Admission 2025 Eligibility, Application, Fees, Dates

paragraphs: The university offers full-time courses at multiple levels. Aspirants can apply for the preferred course via online mode. Below are the key highlights forMMU Sadopur admissions:
Particulars
MMU Sadopur Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
Admission status 2025
Ongoing:UG & PG
How to apply?
https://www.mmambala.org/
Level of programmes offered
Popular programmes

The university offers admission to most of the courses based on merit in the last qualifying exam. Aspirants must fulfil the eligibility requirements to apply for admission at MMU. Below-mentioned are theMaharishi Markandeshwar University coursesalong with eligibility criteria and selection criteria:

The university offers admissions through the online mode. Candidates have to fulfil both eligibility and selection requirements for admission in the university. Below are the steps to get a seat in MMU Sadopur:
Step 1: MMU Sadopur Application Process 2025

Candidates meeting the eligibility criteria can apply online for the preferred programme. Aspirants have to first register with the basic details to generate login credentials and then fill out the application form.
Step 2: Selection

The selection for UG, PG and diploma courses is based on merit of the candidates in the last qualifying exam. The university reviews the applications of the aspirants to confirm their eligibility for admission.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation
Once selected, the university informs the candidates about their admission. Shortlisted aspirants have to pay theMMU Sadopur feeto confirm their seat in the university.

courses_data.name: MMU Sadopur BSc Admission 2025
courses_data.description: MMU Sadopur offers a four-year BSc course divided into eight semesters. The course includes one-year clinical training/ internship. The university offers BSc in various specialisations such as Nursing, Medical Radiography & Imaging Technology, Perfusion Technology, Operation Theatre Technology, etc. Candidates must complete a minimum of Class 12 in relevant subjects to apply for the BSc programme.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for admission to B.Sc Nursing at MMU Sadopur?
faqs.answer: Candidates need to pass Class 12 or equivalent examination with 12 years of schooling with at least five subjects including Physics, Chemistry, Biology and English with a minimum of 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for SC/ ST/ OBC candidates) to apply for MMU Sadopur BSc Nursing programme. Aspirants must hold the documents proving their eligibility for verification at the time of admission.

faqs.question: Which B.Sc specialisations does MMU Sadopur offer?
faqs.answer: MMU Sadopur offers a four-year BSc programme divided into eight semesters. Aspirants need to complete Class 12 in relevant subjects to apply for the preferred BSc specialisation. Below are the BSc specialisations offered at MMU Sadopur:NursingMedical Radiography & Imaging TechnologyPerfusion TechnologyOperation Theatre Technology, etc.

faqs.question: Is there any age limit to apply for B.Sc at MMU Sadopur?
faqs.answer: The minimum age to apply for BSc at MMU Sadopur is 17 years or more as on December 31, of the admission year. Besides, aspirants must also complete Class 12 or equivalent examination in relevant subjects to apply for MMU Sadopur BSc courses.

faqs.question: When is MMU Sadopur BSc admission confirmed?
faqs.answer: MMU Sadopur BSc admission is confirmed when candidates have completed the necessary document verification and paid the some amount of the tuition fee. The total tuition fee of the BSc programme ar MMU Sadopur is INR 1.6 Lakh. Candidates applying for admission into the programme will have to pay that in addition to the admission fee of the institute.

courses_data.name: MMU Sadopur GNM Admission 2025
courses_data.description: MMU Sadopur offers a three-year GNM Nursing course. The selection for GNM is based on the merit of the candidates in the last qualifying exam. Candidates who have passed Class 12 with English individually from any recognised board can apply for GNM Nursing. Aspirants who have completed Class 12 with English with at least 40% aggregate in vocational ANM course can also apply.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility to apply for GNM at MMU Sadopur?
faqs.answer: Aspirants who have completed Class 12 with English and have obtained a minimum of 40% aggregate in the qualifying exam are eligible to apply for MMU Sadopur GNM course. Candidates who have passed Class 12 with English with at least 40% aggregate in vocational ANM course are also eligible to apply.Besides, aspirants who have completed Class 12 with at least 40% aggregate in Vocational Stream-Health care Science can also apply for GNM programme.

faqs.question: What is the duration of GNM at MMU Sadopur?
faqs.answer: MMU Sadopur offers GNM for a duration of three years . Admission to GNM course is based on the merit of the aspirants in the last qualifying exam. Aspirants need to complete Class 12 with English individually from any recognised board can apply for GNM Nursing.

faqs.question: What is the selection criteria for GNM at MMU Sadopur?
faqs.answer: MMU Sadopur selects candidates for GNM based on the merit of the aspirants in the last qualifying exam. Besides, the minimum qualification required for GNM is Class 12 with English with at least 40% aggregate. Once selected, aspirants need to pay the course fee to confirm their seat in the university.
