hostel_campus.college_name: Maharishi Markandeshwar University Sadopur Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: The hostel of the university provides all amenities for a comfortable and enjoyable stay of the students. The hostel provides many facilities like rooms with attached washroom, bed, table, chair and almirahs, air cooler facility/AC (as opted), indoor and outdoor games, free internet connectivity through Wi-Fi system, well-equipped gymnasium separately for boys and girls students and medical facility along with transportation for emergency cases. The hostels are equipped with gym and fitness centre facilities - treadmill, exercise bikes and more of the latest fitness equipment.

library.description: Maharishi Markandeshwar university’s Library has a collection of membership of DELNET that offers access to more than 11.11 million bibliographic records, 33916 union list of current periodicals, 20235 records of union catalogues of periodicals, 912042 records of periodical articles and 48621 records of thesis and dissertations held by 2134 libraries in India and 22 overseas libraries. There is lounge area for browsing/IT zone for accessing e-resources and audio-visual lab for online lectures. The Library has Online Public Access Catalogue (OPAC), which is used to search books and other documents. E-learning is also provided by through NPTEL video lectures.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Swimming Pool, Athletics Track (200 Metre), Long Jump Pit, Shot put Throwing sector, Discus Throwing sector, Hand Ball Ground, Kabaddi Ground, Kho- Kho Ground, Volleyball Ground, Karate Hall, Table Tennis

reviews.review_heading: MM Institute of Nursing and Research.
reviews.review_text: The hostel infrastructure is also good. They provide a room for two students with two almirahs and an attached bathroom. The Wi-Fi service is also best, and the food here in the mess is also good, but they can do better in that. The canteen area is also good with beautiful decorations.

reviews.review_heading: Good cost to study facility.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure and very good lecture halls and theaters, the quality of food are above average in mess and canteen, overall infrastructure and labs are very good to go, Wi-Fi is of good quality little bit glitch sometimes but that is nearly negligible, the library is very good quite equipped with quite a room.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied because of management and their way of working .
reviews.review_text: The room and facilities are good. A room is allowed to 2 students. Medical facilities are not provided. Sports on campus are officially not organised frequently. Wi-Fi is available but is not working properly and there are network issues always. Availability of books is very disappointed for all time. But food quality is average.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with everything which our college provides us.
reviews.review_text: Everything is up to date and good. It is a good university, and it is providing infinite opportunities to its students. It is the best for education and mainly for practical propose. I am highly satisfied to be a part of this university. It was an amazing experience, and it was worth spending four years of my life on this campus.

reviews.review_heading: Overall it is a good college and they also provide quality of education.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good, and we also have the right to use college resource like Wi-Fi, and classrooms are good. The library is well defined. The infrastructure of the college is good. In the hostel, rooms are good, and they provide air-conditioned and non-air-conditioned room as well. The quality of the food served is good, and they also conduct some sports activities.

reviews.review_heading: It is not a very good college for architecture students.
reviews.review_text: Facilities provided by our college are average. Wi-Fi does not work properly, and the internet speed is very low. Classrooms are large but very uncomfortable. Sports and other additional activities are not good.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the quality of education. Dissatisfied with the placements & infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: This college has the average infrastructure. The hostel and medical facilities are not good in campus. Wi-fi connectivity, sports and games facility is average. The quality of food in the mess and canteen is very bad. Hostel rooms are good with attached washrooms.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with my college because of faculty members and Infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of MM University is really aesthetic. We have two big buildings and classrooms are well furnished with AC. Our college also have football ground. Furthermore, the library is also have several books rather than just course books which help the student to gather outside information also.

reviews.review_heading: The college mainly focuses on practical knowledge than the theoretical one.
reviews.review_text: The college has an excellent campus and infrastructure. The entire campus is Wi-Fi enabled. There are proper labs and field area for practical work. Gym facilities are also available here. Cleanliness in our university is the best. Rooms are well ventilated. Buildings are well-equipped. There are 4 huge grounds for sports and other activities.

review_summary.college_name: Bengal School of Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.title: My college has a better placement section.

content.Placements: As a student of the Bengal school of technology. I like to share that my college was better than private Institute. The percentage of students placed every year in my course department was very high compared to private colleges. The highest package offered was about 12 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The student of Bengal School of Technology. I would like to share that my college was better than private Institute. The facilities and infrastructure available in my course department were like Wi-Fi. Classroom labs, ground, washrooms etc were very good according to the fees taken from students.

individual_reviews.title: Great College, and Faculty Helps Us Students.

content.Placements: 99% of students are qualified and placed in the course. The higher package is 4 lakh 50 thousand, and TWF students get a lower package of only 15 thousand. Yes, definitely. More than 97% of students got internships from the course, with roles like Manager, HR, Quality Control, QA, Hospitality Management, and Retail Pharmacist.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides Wi-Fi, labs, digital classrooms, and libraries. The hostel quality is superb, with a playground, cleanliness, and a hostel canteen that gives good meals. Quality and medical facilities, as well as a gym and fitness center, are there in our hostel. I recommend this hostel.

individual_reviews.title: I recommend my junior friend and siblings to this college .

content.Placements: 114 students are present and admitted in B. Pharma for the years 2020-2024. The highest package of the course in management is around 7-8 LPA, and for exam-qualified students, it's 4-4.5 LPA. TWF students are provided 7-8 thousand per semester. Many pharmaceutical companies visit my college and provide job opportunities. 40-30% of students got a job from my college.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel is the most beautiful area, a second home mostly visited and booked because your study hostel is mostly enjoyed by hostelers. All students are guided, hostel super mostly increases student behavior and honest communication. Hostel life is mostly recommended.

individual_reviews.title: Review of Bengal School of Technology.

content.Placements: Bengal School of Technology offers 100% placements. The highest is 4.5 LPA, and the lowest is 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Sun Pharmaceutical Industries Ltd. (Sipla) and Dr. Reddy's Laboratories. It provides training facilities for the students, helping them to grow. Certain seminars are also conducted here.
content.Infrastructure: The Bengal School of Technology offers high-tech labs and a well-furnished library. The campus is surrounded by Wi-Fi. Classrooms are well-decorated with smart board facilities. Hostels are good, and the canteen provides good-quality hygiene foods for students.

individual_reviews.title: It is the best pharmacy college in Hoogly.

content.Placements: About 90% of students were placed in our course because the placements and campaigns are good. The highest salary package offered is 6 LPA and the average salary package offered is 2 LPA. Cipla, Pfizer, Sun Pharma, etc., are the companies that recruit us. Above 50% of students got internships owned by Cipla. The top role is offered in an industrial-level pharmacy.
content.Infrastructure: Our college infrastructure is very good and the college is well mentioned every time. Our college has a Wi-Fi facility. Our labs are very hygienic and our library is very big. The classrooms are very well maintained. Our hostel facility is good. Hostel meals are very hygienic. The college has a canteen.

reviews_list.review_title: It is a good and worthy college for both personal and academic growth.

review_content.Placements: Placements are average and mainly depend on students’ individual skills, performance, and internships. Around 50–60% of students secure placements and internships. The highest package offered is around 6–7 LPA, while the average is 3–4 LPA. Recruiting companies are popular, but as I am not aware of the companies, I cannot specify them.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is spacious, clean, and aesthetically pleasing. It has a pond-like area where students can get some fresh air and relax. Classrooms are good, but a few classrooms still need some improvement. Library is very nice. It is well-stocked with all types of books and journals. Free Wi-Fi is available, as well as a canteen.

reviews_list.review_title: Overall faculty is awesome. Teachers have great experience in teaching.

review_content.Placements: There were no proper placements because its not an engineering college, but there were opportunities, sometimes companies visit for recruitment. There were notices on the college website from which you can see about the placement cell in our college and companies visiting for students with a Science background to hire if students were interested.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure was overall good. Wi-Fi was available in every building. Students can use them. Wi-Fi speed was good. Library was also top class, you could borrow books from there for free, but for a limited period of time you could also renew them. We were in Chemistry department, so chemicals were plentiful, which helped in learning practicals very well. Labs were also good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Computer Science - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It is a really good college.

content.Placements: As this is mainly a B.Sc. And M.Sc. Degree college, proper campus placements are not available. However, some placement support is provided for Computer Science students. The college and the teachers are very good and helpful. Students can easily get internship opportunities from here. The expected salary package is around 3.5 to 5 LPA, even though there is no official placement system.
content.Infrastructure: Students can easily use the library. There are several labs where students can do practical work. The campus has a Wi-Fi facility. Digital boards are used in classrooms. There is a gym for students who like fitness. The canteen is very good. There is no hostel, so students stay in nearby messes or rented rooms.

individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with the facility, however placements are very rare. The infrastructure is not lacking.

content.Placements: I have yet to pass out, but I can provide some details on alumni. From the CS department, a couple of guys got placed in TCS. The Maths department did not see many placements, mostly went for off campus or higher studies. Similar to the department of Physics, mostly off campus and higher studies.
content.Infrastructure: I do not have any use for a hostel, nor does my college provide hostels. I live not too far away, so traveling daily is practical. As for the college infrastructure, we have enough computers, good Wi-Fi, and good enough classrooms/lecture halls. Most of the apparatus is not digital in the Physics lab.

individual_reviews.title: It is a good and worthy college for both personal and academic growth.

content.Placements: Placements are average and mainly depend on students’ individual skills, performance, and internships. Around 50–60% of students secure placements and internships. The highest package offered is around 6–7 LPA, while the average is 3–4 LPA. Recruiting companies are popular, but as I am not aware of the companies, I cannot specify them.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is spacious, clean, and aesthetically pleasing. It has a pond-like area where students can get some fresh air and relax. Classrooms are good, but a few classrooms still need some improvement. Library is very nice. It is well-stocked with all types of books and journals. Free Wi-Fi is available, as well as a canteen.

individual_reviews.title: Overall faculty is awesome. Teachers have great experience in teaching.

content.Placements: There were no proper placements because its not an engineering college, but there were opportunities, sometimes companies visit for recruitment. There were notices on the college website from which you can see about the placement cell in our college and companies visiting for students with a Science background to hire if students were interested.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure was overall good. Wi-Fi was available in every building. Students can use them. Wi-Fi speed was good. Library was also top class, you could borrow books from there for free, but for a limited period of time you could also renew them. We were in Chemistry department, so chemicals were plentiful, which helped in learning practicals very well. Labs were also good.

individual_reviews.title: College is not the place of study, it's about bonding, understanding, etc.

content.Placements: Normal placement companies like TCS. Chances are low, but placement is guaranteed. The teachers always help students with placement issues. Suggest how to be good at that. They will figure it out together for placement problems because they understand.
content.Infrastructure: Clean environment. Good Wi-Fi connection. Canteen food quality is average. Classrooms are well-maintained. Secure and smoke-free campus.
content.Faculty: Teaching quality is too good. The teachers always stand for students. Teachers are friendly with students. Even teachers play with students, like cricket, chess, etc. There is a yoga room for all of us, and it is well-maintained. It is clean also. I like my college.

faqs.question: What is the fee of the courses offered by West Bengal State University?
faqs.answer: The fee for some of the courses offered by West Bengal State University are:CourseTotal tuition feesMBA/PGDM  (19 Courses)INR 1.2 L - 2.2 lakhB.Sc.  (199 Courses)INR 330 - 1.64 lakhB.Com  (33 Courses)INR 3.69 K - 2.54 lakhB.Ed  (10 Courses)INR 90,000B.A. LL.B.  (1 Courses)INR 4.3 lakhCandidates who get the final admission offer are eligible to pay the course fee.

faqs.question: Is MAT mandatory for admission at WBSU?
faqs.answer: MAT is one of the accepting exams for admission to West Bengal State University. However, it is not mandatory. Candidates with a valid score in CAT or XAT can also apply for admission. Besides, aspirants must also complete graduation with at least 50% aggregate for admission.

faqs.question: What are the government jobs that I can seek after completing BA from WBSU?
faqs.answer: Upon finishing a BA at WBSU, students have numerous career opportunities to select from. These include government as well as private sector opportunities. Some of the most sought-after government job openings for WBSU BA graduates are as follows: BA Top Job Profiles Average Salary IAS INR 30 lakh IPS INR 27 lakh IFS INR 27 lakh Social officer INR 18 lakh Research Associate INR 4.6 lakh Social Defense Services INR 14 lakh Social Airforce INR 8.5 lakh Social PO INR 6.8 lakh Social Worker INR 3.4 lakh NOTE: The above details are obtained from different sources. They are still liable to change and, hence, is indicative.

faqs.question: What are the career prospects of pursuing BA at WBSU?
faqs.answer: After completing a BA from WBSU, aspirants have a wide range of career options in the field of Arts and Humanities. Aspirants can opt for careers as an Executive Assistant, Marketing Manager, Assistant Professor, Communication Manager, etc. Some of the popular careers after BA for students of WBSU are listed below: BA Top Job Profiles Average Salary Economist INR 16.2 lakh Executive Assistant INR 4.8 lakh Operations Manager INR 10.8 lakh Marketing Manager INR 12.2 lakh Graphic Development Manager INR 7.3 lakh Communication Manager INR 13.5 lakh Assistant Professor INR 5.5 lakh HR Manager INR 10.9 lakh Graphic Designer INR 3.9 lakh Compliance Advisor INR 7.4 lakh NOTE: The above-mentioned data is taken from the various sources. It is still subject to change and, hence, is indicative.

faqs.question: Are there any government jobs that I can seek after pursuing an MBA from West Bengal State University?
faqs.answer: West Bengal State University MBA graduates can opt for a career in the government sector. A career in this sector provides job security, stability, and work-life balance to employees. Some trending MBA career options in the government sector are as follows: Economist through the Indian Economic Service (IES) Examination Reserve Bank of India Grade B Officer Staff Selection Commission Officer Probationary Officer for Government Banks IAS, IPS, and IFS through the entrance exam UPSC CSE NOTE: The aforementioned data is as per the various sources. It is still subject to change.

faqs.question: What is the highest package for MBA students at West Bengal State University?
faqs.answer: As per the past reports, the highest package for MBA students at West Bengal State University is INR 5 LPA (Lakhs Per Annum). But It depends upon various factors. Year by year it changes but in terms of faculty and environment it is a good university.

reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of our course is really nice. I don't live in the hostel, so I don't have any knowledge about that, but our department has good infrastructure. The lab is nice, the classrooms are clean, and the ACs are working. Overall, nice environment. The department library doesn't have a lot of books, but the university's general library is vast.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Kingston Law CollegeReviewed on 5 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Great law college with supportive faculty, strong library, moot court practice, and good placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. Classrooms are spacious, and the library is one of the best parts, with a strong collection of law books, journals, and online resources. Moot court halls are well-maintained and give a real courtroom experience. Wi-Fi and computer facilities are available. Hostel facilities are okay, basic but manageable. Food quality in the mess is average. The campus is safe and green.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Gobardanga Hindu CollegeReviewed on 23 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Gobardanga Hindu College is good and very clean.
reviews.review_text: Gobardanga Hindu College offers a wide range of undergraduate multidisciplinary programs, including B.A. General (3 year programme). In our college, you can get a good internet connection with Wi-Fi, nice labs, clean classrooms, and a big library. Our college has a good hostel and a canteen. You also get good quality food, etc.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Taki Government CollegeReviewed on 13 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: A suburban college where students meet nature.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library facilities are quite good. Also, the library is fitted with AC, PCs, and comfortable chairs. The hostel is previously opened but is currently under maintenance or not functional. There is an emergency room where medical facilities are available, and a sports ground is available. Every year, cricket and other sports tournaments are organized.

reviews.review_heading: Review of West Bengal State University.
reviews.review_text: The department has a central library and a beautiful lab facility with specialised equipment. It also provides hostel facilities for both girls and boys. In the canteen, many foods items are available. Medical facilities are also good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Barrackpore Rastraguru Surendranath CollegeReviewed on 4 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with great infrastructure and the location is also good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure was good. My department was Zoology. I used to go to college every day. We had air conditioners in our classrooms. We had 3 classrooms, and each had an air-conditioner. The library was also good. Various types of books were available in a quiet atmosphere.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by East Calcutta Girls' CollegeReviewed on 1 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: My college is the best for everyone.
reviews.review_text: Facilities of our college are really impressive. Most impressive facility is education also. Every department has lots of impressive and good teachers. Library is also very good because we can find every subject book. We have no hostel but the canteen facility is good because it's very hygienic.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Barasat Government CollegeReviewed on 1 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It's nothing special than other government oriented colleges.
reviews.review_text: Our laboratory is so good and upgraded. We have a canteen and medical facilities, and the most important part is that there is no union.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Ramakrishna Mission Vivekananda Centenary CollegeReviewed on 30 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college.
reviews.review_text: We can access the library easily. Here are multiple labs to learn hands-on. Wi-Fi is available. Digital boards are available in classrooms. For gym lovers, there is a gym. The canteen is super good. But there is no such hostel, so students stay in a mess.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Dinabandhu MahavidyalayaReviewed on 29 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The truth of Dinabandhu Mahavidyalaya College.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi for students, but the labs, classrooms, and library are quite good. As I am not a hosteller, I can't speak about the hostel facilities. There is no canteen in the college, so whenever I am hungry, I go outside to eat some snacks. The medical facilities are not great, but they are okay. The sports and games facilities are very good, and our college arranges an annual sports day every year.

highlights.summary:
The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the Malda Medical College And Hospital, Malda:

faqs.answer: A:    The overall seats available across all courses offered by Malda Medical College And Hospital, Malda is up to 189. Good thing to know is that Malda Medical College And Hospital, Malda has courses which are approved by prominent Government bodies like INC, NMC.
faqs.question: How many seats are available at Malda Medical College And Hospital, Malda for all courses combined?

reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with college and surroundings.

review_content.Placements: This is a government medical college, so West bengal government hires us. Students get 1 year internship with Rs.28,000 to 30,000. Around 90 seats are available for 125 students which is good. The permanent government job pay scale is around Rs.80,000 per month. Every student got internships under WBUHS. General physicians role is offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: Everything is not up to date but the lecture theater, practical lab, and library is well-equipped, Wi-Fi in a hostel, and the 1st-year hostel is separate where we have to buy drinking water. Hostel is mainly regulated by seniors but they are helpful and are available 24x7. Multiple canteens are available. Silver nest serves good food. It is a medical college so medical faculty is always available. Football and cricket are played every day. Other games are played seasonally or occasionally.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: The infrastructure is good, and the facilities are awesome.

review_content.Placements: All the students got placed. As this is a medical course, the chances of getting a government job are significantly higher during these covid times. The highest package offered is above 70,000, and the lowest salary is about 50,000, and the average salary is about 60,000. Being an MBBS student, I can definitely say that the course is tough, but the job satisfaction is immense.
review_content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are big enough to occupy our batch, and even two batches can easily fit in our classroom. Labs are well conditioned with few malfunctions. The library is awesome, and lots of books are there. The quality of food in the mess is average, and it needs improvement. The staff are good.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with the faculty members.

review_content.Placements: All the students got jobs at decent hospitals, and many students prefer to go for private practice. The salary offered will range from a maximum of 3 lacs per month to Rs. 40,000 per month for those students who went for PG studies. Doctors can go for hospitals like Appolo and other very premium hospitals as well as private practice. Every student gets internships, and most of them will get in the same college or hospital, and some other students go to other colleges as well.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college was good. Trauma center will be open here soon. The college has a capacity to supply oxygen for 22 days if the world's oxygen gets depleted. The annual college fee is Rs. 9,000 and the hostel fee is Rs.12,000. The college has an awesome library with all kind of required books. The hostel has a table tennis board for sports.

review_summary.college_name: Malda Medical College And Hospital ,Malda Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Malda Medical College - A Short Review on the MBBS Course.

content.Placements: Malda Medical College is a government medical college where we are provided with the MBBS course, which has a duration of 5.5 years. It includes a total of 4.5 years of academics and 1 year of mandatory internship. There are 9 semester exams and 4 professional university exams conducted by WBUHS (West Bengal University of Health and Science). During the mandatory internship, we are given around 30,000/month.
content.Infrastructure: We have 19 departments in our college, such as the Department of Anatomy, Physiology, Psychiatry, Radiology, Medicine, Surgery, Orthopaedics, Biochemistry, Obstetrics and Gynaecology, and Paediatrics. Adequate lab facilities, Wi-Fi, lecture theatres, and a central library containing a plethora of books are available. The hostel is good, accommodating 2 to 3 persons per room, and we are provided with a bed, mattress, study table, chair, and almirah.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because of studentfriendly environment, faculty, infrastructure.

content.Placements: In this field and in this course near about two-third people get a chance to do house staff in the same college and rest others try in anoth colleges. Package was not fixed in MBBS. Meny of us continue their currier in big hospital like Apollo, Sonoscan, fortis etc.
content.Infrastructure: Government. Hostels are allowed for ever MBBS student. 2 stude in a room. Big A. C. lecture theates are present in our college. Wi-Fi is available in the hostels. Labs and library IES are quite good. 2 canteens are available in the college campus and their survices are cheap and best.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with college and surroundings.

content.Placements: This is a government medical college, so West bengal government hires us. Students get 1 year internship with Rs.28,000 to 30,000. Around 90 seats are available for 125 students which is good. The permanent government job pay scale is around Rs.80,000 per month. Every student got internships under WBUHS. General physicians role is offered.
content.Infrastructure: Everything is not up to date but the lecture theater, practical lab, and library is well-equipped, Wi-Fi in a hostel, and the 1st-year hostel is separate where we have to buy drinking water. Hostel is mainly regulated by seniors but they are helpful and are available 24x7. Multiple canteens are available. Silver nest serves good food. It is a medical college so medical faculty is always available. Football and cricket are played every day. Other games are played seasonally or occasionally.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The infrastructure is good, and the facilities are awesome.

content.Placements: All the students got placed. As this is a medical course, the chances of getting a government job are significantly higher during these covid times. The highest package offered is above 70,000, and the lowest salary is about 50,000, and the average salary is about 60,000. Being an MBBS student, I can definitely say that the course is tough, but the job satisfaction is immense.
content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are big enough to occupy our batch, and even two batches can easily fit in our classroom. Labs are well conditioned with few malfunctions. The library is awesome, and lots of books are there. The quality of food in the mess is average, and it needs improvement. The staff are good.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the faculty members.

content.Placements: All the students got jobs at decent hospitals, and many students prefer to go for private practice. The salary offered will range from a maximum of 3 lacs per month to Rs. 40,000 per month for those students who went for PG studies. Doctors can go for hospitals like Appolo and other very premium hospitals as well as private practice. Every student gets internships, and most of them will get in the same college or hospital, and some other students go to other colleges as well.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college was good. Trauma center will be open here soon. The college has a capacity to supply oxygen for 22 days if the world's oxygen gets depleted. The annual college fee is Rs. 9,000 and the hostel fee is Rs.12,000. The college has an awesome library with all kind of required books. The hostel has a table tennis board for sports.

paragraphs: Malda Medical College And Hospital ,Malda admissions are based on merit. The institute considers applications of candidates meeting the eligibility criteria.Malda Medical College And Hospital ,Maldaoffers courses at UG and PG levels. Some of the courses include MBBS, UG Diploma, MD and MS. Candidates can apply online for the preferred course.
The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 41,148. Aspirants may also need to pay one-time caution deposit at the time of admission.
The institute offers UG courses for 42 months - 66 months. PG courses are offered for 3 years.
